Name: USoundNodeModulator
Description: Defines a random volume and pitch modification when a sound starts

Variables.Name: PitchMin
Variables.Description: The lower bound of pitch (1.0 is no change).

Variables.Name: PitchMax
Variables.Description: The upper bound of pitch (1.0 is no change).

Variables.Name: VolumeMin
Variables.Description: The lower bound of volume (1.0 is no change).

Variables.Name: VolumeMax
Variables.Description: The upper bound of volume (1.0 is no change).
